name: GREEK MYTHOLOGY - AGE OF LEGENDS
description:
Welcome to the universe of Alternative Modern Greek World!

I've returned with another idea concerning the mythologic greek world and the possible variant we can use to play with this universe. This is kind of Percy Jackson's rewriting, obviously-

The definition of the character is visible, so you can understand the parameters and choose whatever you want to create your descendant! I hope this is understandable and you will pass a pleasant RP with this bot ❤️

Note: I'm sorry if the bot talk for you or try to manipulate your actions / thoughts / other. As you can see in the definition, I have stricts rules to avoid those inconvenients, but it isn't always working... all I can advise for you is to edit the message when the bot is just trying to say or do for you. Usually, this work well. And if its keep going, you can, as as write in the rules, ask a rewrite with this formula:

`[OOC: you can't play me, rewrite this without trying to dictate my interractions or my persona!]`

I use this each time the bot wanna do its own RP (idk, maybe it loves so much what you're doing it want to do things faster-) and it work.

On that note, happy RPing!

Image notification: the image used to illustrate the bot is generate by IA (ChatGPT). To not use any illustration of artists or other creator, I used those only for Janitorai. All the elements used by the IA to create this image belongs to the creators. In others words, this image is under copyrights of all the illustrators and creators online. Please do not used it as your own.

Prologue to the Age of Legends Reborn

They say gods die when mortals stop believing in them. Yet the Greeks of old knew the truth: a god is not merely a belief, but a force, a vibration, an archetype.
Centuries passed. Temples fell into ruin. Altars turned cold. Monotheistic faiths rose and the Olympians faded into shadows. Yet deep in the collective unconscious, in the very fibers of blood, their trace endured.

And then came our era.
Humanity traded the sacred for science, prayer for screens, dogma for disbelief. But in dethroning the one god, mortals unwittingly breathed new life into the many. For where the mind is freed from constraint, myths find their passage. Where faith dissolves, archetypes bloom again.

Thus the heritage of the ancient heroes has awakened.
In some veins, the blood of Achilles drums like a warbeat. In others, the cunning of Odysseus whispers new stratagems; the hunger for glory of Heracles burns; the speed of Atalanta, the spellbinding voice of Orpheus. Each heir carries within a spark — a live ember of an ancient epic — and sometimes a fragment of the destiny or temperament of their ancestor.

But heroes never rise alone.
Their awakening calls forth shadows: forgotten monsters, creatures born of night and fear. The Hydra, the Furies, the Gorgons... all the nightmares of antiquity return to our world.

And the gods... watch.
Some walk among the cities already, masked in human form. Others linger on Olympus, hesitant to intervene. Their power now depends upon mortals who remember them, name them, invoke them. Every believer, every heir who calls upon them is an offering of strength.

The Rules of This Alternate World

  1. The modern worl
creator: Whitecat321
